title: 2026 Grammys Winners Announced: Kendrick Lamar, Clipse, Bad Bunny, and More
text: Complex Magazine reports on the 2026 Grammy Awards winners including the Best Rap Album category. Kendrick Lamar's dominant night at the Grammys saw him claim Best Rap Album for GNX, continuing his remarkable run of success. The win positioned Lamar as the most-awarded rapper in Grammy history, surpassing Jay-Z. Clipse, despite not winning Best Rap Album, took home their first Grammy ever for Best Rap Performance for Chains & Whips, a collaborative track featuring Kendrick Lamar. This represented a historic moment for the reunited duo after 15 years away from the studio. Tyler, The Creator's CHROMAKOPIA did not win Best Rap Album but Tyler continued to demonstrate his artistic prowess with multiple nominations and wins across different categories. GloRilla and JID, both competitive nominees, did not win in the Best Rap Album category but remain significant voices in contemporary hip-hop. The 2026 Grammys validated Kendrick Lamar's position at the forefront of contemporary rap music.
